name: Coffee Junction Cafe
full_address: 1123 Tibouchina Street Montana, Pretoria 0182, South Africa

reviews_data.review_text: Excellent Restaurant. If you haven't been there go! In the five years we have been in Pretoria, we were never disappointed. Thank you will keep on going there.
Baie Lekker. Always worth it!! Excellent service, food fantastic and a joy to go to. Just getting better! Food so good and never been disappointed. The Manager cares and so does all the waiters.
reviews_data.owner_answer: Daniel, your positive rating and review really made my day! Thank you for taking the time out to give us feedback. We are certainly delighted that you enjoyed your visit and we thank you for your loyal support! See you soon. Duncan, Rosanne, Lara and the team

reviews_data.review_text: POOR SERVICE. Cold food, over cooked scrambled eggs. Poor poor service. Have eaten here for many years. Sadly won't return again. No management supervision at all, while we were there. VERY DISAPPOINTING. Have a manager on duty. Supervising what comes out of the kitchen.
reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your feedback and for affording us the opportunity to respond to your complaint and rating. We as owners strive to provide excellent service and an excellent product and for this reason are on duty overseeing things daily. If it so happens that we are out or off site doing catering, we have two excellent managers, Ronald and Barbara who we hand over to. Regarding the cold food - this is surprising.

reviews_data.review_text: Good Food. Great staff until you encounter the manager. Food was great. Staff no problem. The manager is inconsiderate. He treats the clients with no respect.
reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi - Thank you for providing us with feedback on your experience at Coffee Junction Café. I am indeed very surprised by your review and your comment that the manager does not treat clients with respect? Our manager Ronald has been with us for 10 years and in all my years working with him he has not once treated any client or colleague disrespectfully. I have a number of clients who will attest to this fact.

reviews_data.author_title: Love to travel, eat and relax
reviews_data.review_text: Breakfast served all day long. What a surprise to see a coffee shop that serves breakfast meals after 12h00. I can highly recommend the poached eggs on a potato rosti. Meal was quickly prepared, very well presented on the plate and tasted devine.
reviews_data.owner_answer: A very big THANK YOU for your super review and kind comments! Please do visit us soon and try out a couple of our new dishes. Duncan, Rosanne and Lara

reviews_data.review_text: Superb food. Great food with excellent service. Had a chicken, feta and avo pancake which comes highly recommended...super fresh ingredients in the salad...extensive menu for all tastes...super decor...the colours are gorgeous. Thank you Duncan for the chat...you have an awesome family friendly eatery.
reviews_data.owner_answer: What a lovely encouraging and positive review. I must apologise for only getting back to you now. I was not aware our listing was active and to date have only focused on the Google review platform. So thank you for taking the time out to let us know and for your kind words. See you soon! Duncan, Rosanne and Lara

reviews_data.review_text: Breakfast. This is a great coffee shop with a large breakfast menu. The food is delicious, we had poached eggs, really good. The staff is friendly.
reviews_data.owner_answer: So happy to read that we impressed you and that you enjoyed your visit to Coffee Junction Café. We really value feedback both negative and positive and appreciate our customers and friends keeping us informed. Thank you. CJC Team

reviews_data.review_text: A Quick Bite. A lovely little café, a nice big menu full of options to suit every single person. A huge selection of different coffees, lattes, smoothies and milkshakes. Cake was lovely and fresh. Service is fast and friendly.
reviews_data.owner_answer: So super to receive your positive feedback and read your great review. Thank you so much for letting us know that we are doing things correctly. We really appreciate the compliments. See you soon!

reviews_data.review_text: Pace it up. The food is nice, the spot is nice especially for morning business meeting. But service is a drag. First orders take time to come, meals come much later. Just pick up pace.
reviews_data.owner_answer: Lerato, thank you for the constructive feedback. I have addressed your comments with the team and would appreciate when you visit again if you would please be so kind as to introduce yourself and let us know how we are doing and if we are meeting your expectations. As mentioned in many other reviews we are always so pleased and grateful to receive feedback especially if it helps us improve. See you soon.

reviews_data.review_text: Meeting spot. Just wanted to say that you guys are one of The Infinite Teams favourite meeting spots! And your cappuccinos are the best! (I do visit lots of coffee shops every week!) Waiters are always friendly. Thanks for serving a great cappuccino!
reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Hester for your loyal support and for the great comments. We really appreciate your and the teams support! Duncan, Rosanne and Lara

reviews_data.review_text: Nice. The owner is known to me and I enjoy him. As a coffee cafe, it is ok and cozy. A little expensive but reasonable. Will not make it a night out but as day time meeting place very nice.
reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the rating and review. I am happy to report that we are very competitively priced and that there have been a number of other positive improvements since your review. We hope you visit us again if you still live in the area. Cheers. Duncan

reviews_data.review_text: Our new favorite! My husband treated me to this restaurant for my birthday for breakfast. Everything was great. From our table space to the service to the food. This place is quite busy and I can see why! We are planning on going there again this Sunday.
Great Coffee and Location. My regular favourite spot for great coffee and a good catch up with the girls. Next to Woolies which is super convenient for doing the grocery shopping afterwards.

After action satisfaction. I really enjoy my coffee and brekky at CJ after a mornings cycle training! Duncan and his staff are always attentive always making us feel welcome! The menu and food always good, the cake... to die for. Situated in the corner where you can relax and let the morning go by. The only downer, is that patrons are allowed to smoke outside on the shaded deck.
Poor service. Not a busy time of the day and not busy, but we had to ask repeatedly for butter for the scones, then jam for the scones. Waited a long time for 2 scones.
